title: Text-to-Visualization
summary: Use a text prompt and render a visual output.
inputPlaceholder: Describe what you want to view.
examplesCaption: Select a sample prompt, then press Enter to display the visualization.
outputCaption: Photosynthesis inforgraphics with clear labels and arrows.

exampleInputs.label: Photosynthesis diagram
exampleInputs.input: Create a classroom-friendly diagram that explains photosynthesis. Show sunlight, water, carbon dioxide, glucose, and oxygen with clear labels and arrows.
